pages.title: Incident Response Runbook
pages.author: sre@acme.com
pages.content:
A Sev1 incident must be acknowledged within 5 minutes.
Never resolve a Sev1 incident without a written post-mortem.
To respond to an incident:
1. Classify the severity of the incident.
2. Page the on-call engineer for the affected service.
3. Open an incident channel and post a status update.
Escalation: for a Sev1 outage, escalate to the incident commander.
